new_patterns: Mantine Accordion (collapsible scrape-pool cards): bg white, border 1px solid rgb(222,226,230), border-radius 4px, items separated; left 4px accent bar in status color (green rgb(211,249,216) / red rgb(255,227,227))
Accordion header: padding 0 16px, font-size 16px/400, neutral text, chevron icon on right
Group header RHS stats: 'N / M up' label + colored status dot
Table (nested inside accordion item): collapse, th 14px/700 padding 7px 10px, td 14px/400 padding 7px 10px, no row borders (relies on whitespace)
Status Badge component (_healthOk / _healthErr classes): pill radius 1000px, padding 0 10px, 11px/700, textTransform uppercase — dom text is lowercase 'up'/'down', rendered uppercase via CSS
Label Badge (_labelBadge): same pill shape bg rgb(241,243,245) text rgb(73,80,87) 11px/700 padding 0 10px — textTransform NONE (raw label="value" preserved)
Stats Badge (_statsBadge): same pill shape, same colors, BUT textTransform uppercase (so '5.41s ago' becomes '5.41S AGO'). Visually identical to _labelBadge except for uppercase.
Filter toolbar: 3 inputs — Select (chevron), Select (chevron + icon), Text (search icon) + icon-button on far right (data-table toggle?)

status_normalization_finding.note: Text is stored lowercase in DOM but displayed uppercase. Downstream ingestion (logs, copy-paste) will produce lowercase.

elements: Top nav active pill showing breadcrumb-style 'Status > Target health' inside primary blue pill
